name: Pendo Product Analytics API
what_it_does: Enterprise product analytics and user guidance platform with REST API — tracking feature usage, user behavior, and NPS scores, while delivering in-app guides, tooltips, and announcements, with data export and segment management via API.
use_cases: Exporting product usage data (feature clicks, page views) from Pendo to data warehouse via API
Managing in-app guide segments and targeting programmatically via REST API
Querying NPS survey responses and feedback via API for customer success workflows
Creating and updating account/visitor metadata for advanced segmentation
Integrating Pendo behavioral data with CRM and marketing tools via data export API
not_for: Simple event tracking without in-app guidance needs (use Mixpanel or Amplitude)
Small teams on tight budget — Pendo is enterprise-priced (use PostHog or Heap for SMBs)
Developer tools or APIs without a user-facing web UI to track
best_when: An enterprise product team needs combined product analytics, in-app guidance, and NPS collection with API data export to data warehouse and CRM.
avoid_when: You need affordable product analytics without enterprise pricing, or don't need in-app guidance alongside analytics.

auth.notes: Integration key from Pendo app settings. X-Pendo-Integration-Key header. Read-only vs read-write keys available. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes. Per-subscription key management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise custom pricing; Base starting ~$7,000/year per product
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing — typically $7K-$50K+ per year depending on MAU and features. No self-serve pricing. Sales-led. US-based (Raleigh, NC). Strong enterprise adoption. Acquired Zendo (AI assistant). Pendo Free (limited) available for very small teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for data export (events, pages, guides), account/visitor metadata management, and feedback retrieval. No webhooks — polling required. API primarily for data export rather than real-time control. Good documentation for enterprise use cases.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Metadata updates idempotent for same account/visitor. Data export queries always idempotent. Guide management operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise pricing means API access may be restricted by tier — verify with sales
No webhooks — must poll for new data (feedback, responses)
JavaScript snippet required for tracking — pure API tracking limited
Annual contract minimum — significant commitment before evaluating API quality

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant. HIPAA available. US and EU data residency. Integration key with read/write separation. Enterprise SLA with security review process. Strong enterprise security posture.
